# entityDescription

**Type Property**

The entity description of the persistent history transaction entity.

## Declaration

```swift
class var entityDescription: NSEntityDescription? { get }
```

## Discussion

The entity description of [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSPersistentHistoryTransaction] lists the properties of the persistent history change. This can be useful for filtering your request.

## Customizing History Fetch Requests

- **fetchRequest**: A fetch request that has the persistent history transaction as the entity.
- **entityDescription(with:)**: Requests an entity description using the provided context for the managed object type affected by the transaction.
